description: Govern-the-verb negative oracle vector. Perception-shaped side-data that MUST NOT influence a PolarSeek admission decision. Each field is injected into intent.params; a conforming kernel returns a BYTE-IDENTICAL Decision (it governs the typed verb — type/amount/counterparty — never accompanying perception). This file lives in conformance/vectors/ (clean-room-lint skipped) so it may name the forbidden SIGA perception primitives precisely in order to forbid their influence.
